parameters.query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
 'period_start', (now()::date - 7),
 'period_end', now()::date,
 'signals_this_week', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'type', s.type, 'summary', s.summary, 'quote', left(s.quote, 200),
     'band', s.details->>'band', 'category', s.details->>'risk_category',
     'networks', s.details->>'networks_total', 'value_mentioned', s.details->>'value',
     'account', a.name, 'status', s.status, 'created', s.created_at::date))
   FROM signals s LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
   WHERE s.created_at > now() - interval '7 days'), '[]'::jsonb),
 'signal_counts_prev_week', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_object_agg(t.type, t.n) FROM (
     SELECT type, count(*) AS n FROM signals
     WHERE created_at BETWEEN now() - interval '14 days' AND now() - interval '7 days'
     GROUP BY type) t), '{}'::jsonb),
 'unresolved_risks', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'summary', s.summary, 'account', a.name, 'band', s.details->>'band',
     'age_days', (now()::date - s.created_at::date)))
   FROM signals s LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
   WHERE s.type = 'risk' AND s.status IN ('new','routed') AND s.created_at < now() - interval '14 days'), '[]'::jsonb),
 'recurring_themes', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('account', x.account, 'category', x.category, 'times', x.n)) FROM (
     SELECT a.name AS account, s.details->>'risk_category' AS category, count(*) AS n
     FROM signals s JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
     WHERE s.type = 'risk' AND s.created_at > now() - interval '14 days' AND s.details->>'risk_category' IS NOT NULL
     GROUP BY a.name, s.details->>'risk_category' HAVING count(*) >= 2) x), '[]'::jsonb),
 'calls_per_account', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('account', x.account, 'this_week', x.tw, 'prev_week', x.pw)) FROM (
     SELECT a.name AS account,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE c.call_date > now() - interval '7 days') AS tw,
            count(*) FILTER (WHERE c.call_date BETWEEN now() - interval '14 days' AND now() - interval '7 days') AS pw
     FROM calls c JOIN accounts a ON a.id = c.account_id
     WHERE c.call_date > now() - interval '14 days' GROUP BY a.name) x), '[]'::jsonb),
 'weekly_report_rags', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'project', w.project_title, 'account', w.account_name, 'rag', w.rag))
   FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.week_ending > now() - interval '10 days'), '[]'::jsonb),
 'open_pipeline', (SELECT jsonb_build_object('deals', count(*), 'value', COALESCE(sum(amount),0)) FROM deals WHERE is_open)
) AS ctx;

parameters.content:
## tnAI weekly brief (Leadership OS)
Every Monday 07:50 (after recon 07:00, org sync 07:10, HubSpot 07:30): rolls up the past 7 days - signals with quotes, unresolved 14+ day risks, RAG mix, call volume, open pipeline - and writes the MD's three-section brief (what's happening / why / what needs you). Stored in `briefs`; the dashboard reads the latest via /api/brief.

**Run the db/2026-07_leadership_os.sql migration first.** Manual 'Run' trigger = regenerate on demand.
